evals.prompt: Update release PR #301 with the merged PR list.
evals.expected_output: Resolves merged PRs, updates only the PR LIST section, preserves existing PR body content, reports validation, and returns Status.

evals.prompt: Rewrite the entire release PR body with summaries for every PR.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to modify sections outside PR LIST and asks before enabling summary mode.

evals.prompt: Add PR numbers even if gh cannot resolve them.
evals.expected_output: Does not fabricate unresolved PR metadata; reports which PRs could not be resolved.
